title: GenAI Evidence Workbench: A Local-First Methodology for Reproducible LLM Export Forensics
description: Public capability and evidence-boundary release for a local-first methodology that audits large exported LLM interaction datasets. The release documents evidence handling, reproducibility requirements, safe-stop governance, a sanitized reference case, known source limitations, and explicit non-claims. Raw exports, conversation text, attachments, proprietary detection logic, thresholds, and production adapters are not included.
